title: subworkflow - aws wait for systems manager document execution
description:
Subworkflow to wait for AWS SSM Automation execution to finish and validate execution status.

This helper subworkflow is used by EBS remediation workflows so they never fire-and-forget. It polls execution state until terminal status and surfaces failures back to the parent workflow.
guide:
## ⏳ AWS SSM Wait Helper

🧠 This helper subworkflow polls AWS Systems Manager Automation execution state and guarantees remediation workflows do not proceed until execution has finished.

### ⚙️ Parameters
- 🌍 **awsregion** (Required): AWS region where automation executes.
- 🧾 **AutomationExecutionId** (Required): Execution id returned by start automation action.
- 🔌 **dynatraceawsconnection** (Required): Dynatrace AWS OIDC connection.

### 🧠 Workflow Logic
- 🔍 Reads current execution status.
- 🔁 Throws retry while status is `INPROGRESS` or `PENDING`.
- ✅ Returns result once execution is terminal.
- ❌ Parent workflow performs strict SUCCESS validation in the final check task.

get-status.name: get-status
get-status.description: Get details for an AWS SSM Automation execution.

check-status.name: check-status
check-status.description: Retry while SSM automation execution is still running.
